Name: Name
LoginIntroDescription: Sign in to discover nearby shops on the map, place orders, or open your own digital storefront.
AboutIntro1: GPS Shops is a global, location-aware marketplace that connects people with the shops, services, and experiences around them — wherever they are in the world.
AboutIntro2: We combine the power of local discovery with the convenience of online shopping, helping businesses create beautiful digital storefronts that customers can find instantly through map-based search and global discovery.
OurMissionP1: We believe local commerce should feel as effortless as scrolling a feed.
OurMissionP2: From a single market stall to a growing retail chain, every business deserves the ability to be discovered, browsed, and supported online without needing expensive websites, complex systems, or large marketing budgets.
DiscoverNearbyShopsDesc: Use the interactive map to explore shops, services, and local businesses near your current location.
BrowseAndOrderDesc: View menus, products, and services, build your basket, and place orders quickly from your phone.
OpenYourOwnShopDesc: Create and manage your own digital storefront with a powerful mobile-first dashboard designed for speed and simplicity.
GoGlobalDesc: Upgrade to Pro Mode to unlock Global Shop visibility, custom GPS location settings, reduced adverts, and premium features.
MultiLanguageThemeDesc: Use the platform in your preferred language and theme for a fully personalised experience.
WhyGPSShopsP1: Because the future of shopping is not just online.
WhyGPSShopsP2: It is local, global, mobile, and immediate.
FounderVisionP1: GPS Shops began as an idea to bridge the gap between physical shops and the digital world.
FounderVisionP2: Long before modern AI tools and rapid app builders, the vision was simple:
FounderVisionP3: Make it possible for any business, anywhere, to create a digital shop that customers could discover instantly through location and mobile technology.
FounderVisionP4: This original founder video shares the early concept behind what is now GPS Shops.
FounderVisionP5: While the platform has evolved significantly since then, the mission remains the same:
WatchOriginalConceptVideo: Watch the original concept video below.
GetInTouchP1: Questions, feedback, partnerships, or want to list your shop?
SeoTitle_Home: GPS Shops — Discover Local Shops & Order Online Anywhere
SeoDesc_Home: GPS Shops is a global, location-aware marketplace. Discover nearby shops on the map, browse menus, order in seconds, or open your own digital storefront.
SeoTitle_About: About GPS Shops — Your Shop, Anywhere
SeoDesc_About: Learn about GPS Shops: a global, location-aware marketplace that helps people discover nearby shops and lets any business build a digital storefront in minutes.
SeoDesc_Legal: GPS Shops legal terms, disclaimer, and limitation of liability. Read the conditions for using our location-aware marketplace platform.
SeoTitle_Contact: Contact GPS Shops — Get in Touch
SeoDesc_Contact: Contact GPS Shops for support, partnerships, listing your business, or general questions. Email support@gpsshops.com.
ContactPageIntro: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question about the platform, want to list your shop, need support with an order, or are exploring partnerships, our team is here to help.
ContactEmailDesc: Best for support, partnerships, and general enquiries.
ContactWebsiteDesc: Visit our homepage to explore the platform.
ContactListShopDesc: Open your own digital storefront from inside the app — sign in, then choose Build Shop from the menu.
ContactResponseTimesDesc: We aim to respond to all enquiries within 1–2 business days. For urgent order issues, please include your order reference in the subject line.
Legal_Intro1: GPS Shops is a location-aware digital marketplace platform that allows businesses, sellers, and customers to connect through online storefronts, map-based discovery, and digital ordering services.
Legal_Intro2: By using this website, mobile app, or any related services operated by GPS Shops, you agree to the following terms and conditions.
Legal_S1_P1: GPS Shops provides a platform for independent businesses, sellers, and customers to connect.
Legal_S1_P2: We are not the direct seller, supplier, manufacturer, or delivery provider for goods or services listed by third-party businesses unless explicitly stated otherwise.
Legal_S1_P3: Transactions made through the platform are primarily agreements between the buyer and the individual seller or business.
Legal_S2_P1: All users use GPS Shops at their own risk.
Legal_S2_P2: Buyers are responsible for verifying the legitimacy, quality, suitability, and reliability of any seller, product, or service before making a purchase.
Legal_S2_P3: Sellers are responsible for ensuring that all products, services, pricing, descriptions, and business information provided are accurate, lawful, and up to date.
Legal_S2_P4: Users are responsible for maintaining the security of their own accounts, passwords, and login credentials.
Legal_S3_P1: Payment transactions may be processed through third-party providers such as Stripe or other payment platforms.
Legal_S3_P2: GPS Shops is not responsible for:
Legal_S3_P3: Any disputes relating to purchases, refunds, deliveries, or product quality must be resolved directly between the buyer and the seller unless otherwise required by law.
Legal_S4_P1: Pro Mode subscriptions and premium services may provide additional features such as Global Shop visibility, reduced advertising, enhanced shop controls, and premium tools.
Legal_S4_P2: Subscription fees are non-refundable unless required by law or explicitly stated otherwise.
Legal_S4_P3: Users are responsible for managing cancellations through the appropriate payment provider or app store platform.
Legal_S4_P4: Failure to cancel recurring subscriptions may result in continued billing according to the subscription terms.
Legal_S5_P1: While we aim to provide reliable service, GPS Shops does not guarantee uninterrupted access, permanent uptime, or error-free operation.
Legal_S5_B8: service interruptions caused by third-party providers
Legal_S5_P3: Users should maintain their own backups of important business data where appropriate.
Legal_S6_P1: To the maximum extent permitted by law, GPS Shops, its owners, operators, affiliates, employees, and partners shall not be liable for:
Legal_S6_B9: security breaches caused by third-party services
Legal_S6_B10: any consequential or incidental damages arising from use of the platform
Legal_S6_P2: Use of the platform is entirely at your own risk.
Legal_S7_P1: Users must not use GPS Shops for:
Legal_S7_P2: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts without notice where misuse is suspected.
Legal_S8_P1: All branding, logos, platform design, software, content structure, and original materials relating to GPS Shops remain the intellectual property of GPS Shops unless otherwise stated.
Legal_S8_P2: Users may not copy, reproduce, resell, or exploit platform materials without written permission.
Legal_S9_P1: Use of the platform is also governed by our Privacy Policy.
Legal_S9_P2: By using GPS Shops, users agree to the collection and processing of data necessary to operate the platform, including account details, location-based services, and transaction-related information where applicable.
Legal_S10_P1: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time without prior notice.
Legal_S10_P2: Continued use of the platform after updates are published constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
Legal_S10_P3: Users are encouraged to review this page periodically.
Legal_S11_P1: For legal enquiries, platform concerns, or general support, please contact:
Legal_Footer: By continuing to use GPS Shops, you confirm that you understand and accept these Terms, Disclaimer, and Limitation of Liability.
